user_request: Implement Phase-Based Rule Cache system from Phase_Rule_Cache_Implementation_Guide.md

Verified infrastructure-first principles and constitutional compliance requirements

steps_completed.name: Architect Interaction
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 2 PASS: Architect interaction completed, task clarified
actions: User provided Phase_Rule_Cache_Implementation_Guide.md
Clarified task: Implement 3-phase rule cache system (Cache Creation, Rule Reminding, Compliance Validation)
Confirmed focus on agent compliance validation rather than technical output validation

steps_completed.name: Research
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 3 PASS: Research completed, best practices identified
actions: Researched rule cache system implementation best practices
Researched governance systems for AI code generation agents
Researched rule-based AI agent architecture enforcement mechanisms

steps_completed.name: Options
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 4 PASS: Options generated with quality metrics and architect opinion provided
actions: Generated 4 implementation options with quality metrics
Provided architect analysis recommending Option 3 (Hybrid Devin + Custom Infrastructure)
User selected simplified 3-phase approach focusing on core functionality
Refined specification to MD-based rule parsing and agent compliance validation

steps_completed.name: Decide
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 5 PASS: Decision made, compliance validated
actions: User approved simplified MD-based 3-phase specification
Validated constitutional compliance for infrastructure-first approach
Confirmed separation of authority and intelligence components

steps_completed.name: Specify
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 6 PASS: Specification completed, compliance verified
actions: Created detailed specification for 3-phase rule cache system
Defined Phase 1: Cache Creation using model reasoning
Defined Phase 2: Rule Reminding before each step
Defined Phase 3: Agent Compliance Validation at phase end
User selected Mode 2: Manual iterative implementation

steps_completed.name: Implement
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 7 PASS: Implementation completed, architecture compliant
actions: Created directory structure following IDE architecture rules
Implemented create-rule-cache skill (.devin/skills/create-rule-cache/SKILL.md)
Implemented remind-rules skill (.devin/skills/remind-rules/SKILL.md)
Implemented validate-compliance skill (.devin/skills/validate-compliance/SKILL.md)
Created md_rule_parser.py script for parsing .md rule files
Created agent_compliance_validator.py script for compliance checking
Tested core components with sample cache
Verified Windows compatibility for symbols and encoding

steps_completed.name: Test
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 8 PASS: All tests passed successfully
actions: Tested MD rule parser with existing Architect rules
Tested cache creation with sample phase
Tested rule reminder formatting
Tested compliance validation with sample cache
Verified directory structure compliance
Confirmed Windows compatibility for text output

steps_completed.name: Verify
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 9 PASS: Implementation verified, compliance confirmed
actions: Verified implementation matches specification
Confirmed IDE architecture rules compliance
Verified constitutional framework adherence
Confirmed infrastructure-first principles maintained

steps_completed.name: Document
steps_completed.gate_verification: ✅ Gate 10 PASS: Documentation completed, examples created
actions: Created comprehensive documentation at Docs/specs/phase-rule-cache-system.md
Documented usage workflow for all 3 phases
Documented rule parsing and priority mapping
Documented compliance checking methods
Created testing examples and troubleshooting guide

outcomes.recommendation: Proceed with production deployment of rule cache system
next_steps: Test skills in actual Devin CLI environment
Train users on 3-phase rule cache workflow
Monitor compliance reports for rule effectiveness

issues_encountered.issue: Skills not initially discoverable by Devin CLI
issues_encountered.resolution: Moved skills to correct .devin/skills/ directory structure

issues_encountered.issue: Unicode encoding errors with emoji symbols on Windows
issues_encountered.resolution: Replaced emoji with text-based priority indicators
issues_encountered.impact: Updated skill documentation and test scripts

lessons_learned: Devin CLI skills require specific directory structure and naming
Windows environment requires ASCII-compatible text output
MD-based rule parsing effectively leverages existing infrastructure
Agent compliance validation requires conversation log analysis
